  "title": "Assistant Outlet Manager - QSR",
  "description": "Allen Professional Services - Our client, a Fast Food Chain, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Assistant Outlet Manager - QSR

Job Location: Owerri, Imo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview


	The Assistant Outlet Manager is responsible for supporting the Outlet Manager in the day-to-day operation of an outlet, ensuring excellent customer service, staff discipline, food safety compliance, and achievement of sales and operational targets.
	The role bridges management and frontline staff, enforcing the company&#39;s standards, policies, and culture across front-end and back-end operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Reports to the Outlet Manager.
	Manage the Outlet (in the absence of an Outlet Manager).
	Operations &amp; service delivery.
	Staff supervision &amp; discipline.
	Sales &amp; performance management.
	Inventory &amp; stock control.
	Compliance &amp; reporting.
	Training &amp; quality control.


Key Performance Indicators(KPIs)


	Customer satisfaction and complaint resolution
	Staff discipline and attendance
	Sales performance and target achievement
	Cleanliness and food safety compliance
	Stock control and waste reduction
	Adherence to SOPs and company policies.


Requirements


	Minimum of B.Sc.
	2 &ndash; 4 years of experience in a QSR supervisory role.
	Strong understanding of restaurant operations.


Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Strong leadership and people management skills.
	Excellent communication and conflict resolution skills.
	Good numerical and reporting skills.
	Ability to work under pressure and manage shifts.
	High level of integrity and accountability.
	Customer-focused mindset.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their recent CV to: recruitmentservices@allen.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Assistant Outlet Manager - QSR Job at Allen Professional Services




        
    

        
        Allen Professional Services - Our client, a Fast Food Chain, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Assistant Outlet Manager - QSR

Job Location: Owerri, Imo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Overview
     

            
    




	The Assistant Outlet Manager is responsible for supporting the Outlet Manager in the day-to-day operation of an outlet, ensuring excellent customer service, staff discipline, food safety compliance, and achievement of sales and operational targets.
	The role bridges management and frontline staff, enforcing the company's standards, policies, and culture across front-end and back-end operations.


Key Responsibilities


	Reports to the Outlet Manager.
	Manage the Outlet (in the absence of an Outlet Manager).
	Operations & service delivery.
	Staff supervision & discipline.
	Sales & performance management.
	Inventory & stock control.
	Compliance & reporting.
	Training & quality control.


Key Performance Indicators(KPIs)


	Customer satisfaction and complaint resolution
	Staff discipline and attendance
	Sales performance and target achievement
	Cleanliness and food safety compliance
	Stock control and waste reduction
	Adherence to SOPs and company policies.


Requirements


	Minimum of B.Sc.
	2 – 4 years of experience in a QSR supervisory role.
	Strong understanding of restaurant operations.


Skills & Competencies:


	Strong leadership and people management skills.
	Excellent communication and conflict resolution skills.
	Good numerical and reporting skills.
	Ability to work under pressure and manage shifts.
	High level of integrity and accountability.
	Customer-focused mindset.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their recent CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Finance Support Officer",
  "description": "Total Data Limited is a management consultancy firm specializing in the provision of Human Resources and Manpower solutions to its&rsquo; clients across Nigeria. We focus on providing additional and exceptional services through value added, and end-to-end HR services to our clients; helping them maximize and build operational efficiency.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance Support Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a detail-oriented and motivated Finance Support Officer to join our team.
	In this role, you will play a key part in day-to-day financial operations, with a strong focus on payroll management, statutory tax compliance, and accurate financial data entry.
	The ideal candidate possesses solid analytical skills, a deep understanding of accounting principles, and hands-on experience with Quickbooks accounting software.&nbsp;


Key Responsibilities


	Payroll Management: End-to-end processing of monthly payroll, ensuring accurate calculations of earnings, deductions, and net pay.&nbsp;
	Statutory Remittances: Compute, file, and ensure timely remittance of statutory deductions (including PAYE, VAT, WHT, NHF and Pension) in strict compliance with current tax laws.&nbsp;
	Bookkeeping &amp; Data Entry: Maintain accurate financial records by posting daily transactions, invoices, and expenses on QuickBooks Online.&nbsp;
	Reconciliations: Perform monthly bank and ledger reconciliations to ensure financial data integrity.&nbsp;
	Financial Support: Assist the finance team with audit preparations, financial reporting, and handling routine vendor or client payment inquiries.&nbsp;


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Education: Bachelor&rsquo;s degree (B.Sc.) or HND in Accounting, Finance, or a related discipline.&nbsp;
	Experience: 1&ndash;3 years of proven experience in a similar accounting or finance support role.&nbsp;
	Software Proficiency: Hands-on experience working with QuickBooks Online and advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel.&nbsp;
	Technical Skills: Strong understanding of payroll processing workflows and statutory tax regulations. Professional certification progress (e.g., ICAN, ACCA) is an added advantage.&nbsp;
	Soft Skills: Exceptional attention to detail, strong organizational skills, and the ability to handle sensitive financial data with high confidentiality.&nbsp;


Salary
N180,000 - N200,000 monthly.",

Finance Support Officer Job at Total Data Limited




        
    

        
        Total Data Limited is a management consultancy firm specializing in the provision of Human Resources and Manpower solutions to its’ clients across Nigeria. We focus on providing additional and exceptional services through value added, and end-to-end HR services to our clients; helping them maximize and build operational efficiency.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Finance Support Officer

Job Location: Lagos
Employment type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	We are seeking a detail-oriented and motivated Finance Support Officer to join our team.
	In this role, you will play a key part in day-to-day financial operations, with a strong focus on payroll management, statutory tax compliance, and accurate financial data entry.
	The ideal candidate possesses solid analytical skills, a deep understanding of accounting principles, and hands-on experience with Quickbooks accounting software. 


Key Responsibilities


	Payroll Management: End-to-end processing of monthly payroll, ensuring accurate calculations of earnings, deductions, and net pay. 
	Statutory Remittances: Compute, file, and ensure timely remittance of statutory deductions (including PAYE, VAT, WHT, NHF and Pension) in strict compliance with current tax laws. 
	Bookkeeping & Data Entry: Maintain accurate financial records by posting daily transactions, invoices, and expenses on QuickBooks Online. 
	Reconciliations: Perform monthly bank and ledger reconciliations to ensure financial data integrity. 
	Financial Support: Assist the finance team with audit preparations, financial reporting, and handling routine vendor or client payment inquiries. 


Requirements & Qualifications


	Education: Bachelor’s degree (B.Sc.) or HND in Accounting, Finance, or a related discipline. 
	Experience: 1–3 years of proven experience in a similar accounting or finance support role. 
	Software Proficiency: Hands-on experience working with QuickBooks Online and advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel. 
	Technical Skills: Strong understanding of payroll processing workflows and statutory tax regulations. Professional certification progress (e.g., ICAN, ACCA) is an added advantage. 
	Soft Skills: Exceptional attention to detail, strong organizational skills, and the ability to handle sensitive financial data with high confidentiality. 


Salary
N180,000 - N200,000 monthly.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Inventory Analyst Lead, Support Services Job at Naurex Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        NAUREXinternational - Founded in 1999 by its current Chairman, NAUREXinternational is today a leading provider of Technical Services and Staffing Solutions  in the fields of Oil and Gas (Up, Middle and Downstream), Renewable Energy, Marine Services, Petrochemical, Nuclear and  Construction Industries. 
     

            
    



NAUREXinternational’s strong commitment to client satisfaction is reflected in the long-term business relationships it enjoys today with  some of the world’s leading companies such as oil and gas operators, EPCMs and specialist niche companies.  NAUREXinternational is able to draw on its experience to identify and select the highest qualified personnel to carry out its clients’ assignments  worldwide.  NAUREXinternational’s emphasis on health & Safety guarantees that all workers are suitably trained to the required safety standards. 

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Analyst Lead, Support Services

Job Location: Lagos
Job type: Full-time

Qualifications


	Interested applicant(s) should possess relevant qualifications and experience.


Method of Application 
?Interested and qualified candidates should submit their CV in Microsoft Word format, to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Digital Marketing / Social Media Officer",
  "description": "AAA Medi-Calibrations Limited is a fast-growing medical equipment, laboratory, IVF, and healthcare solutions company with operations across Nigeria and West Africa. Founded in 2012, AAAMCL has grown from a specialist calibration services company into a trusted provider of high-quality medical laboratory equipment, IVF equipment and consumables,technical support, installation, training, and after-sales service.

At AAAMCL, we serve some of the most specialized and sensitive areas of healthcare, including IVF clinics and specialty laboratories. Our work supports healthcare professionals who rely on precision, quality, reliability, and speed to deliver excellent outcomes for their patients. We partner with reputable international brands and suppliers,allowing us to bring world-class solutions to the African healthcare market.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketing / Social Media Officer

Job Location: Jibowu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	As we continue to expand our product portfolio and market presence, we are looking for a creative, organised, and results-driven Digital Marketing / Social Media Officer to manage our business social media accounts and support the company&rsquo;s overall digital marketing activities.
	The Digital Marketing / Social Media Officer will be responsible for managing our online presence across social media platforms and supporting digital marketing campaigns that promote our products, services, brand credibility, and customer engagement.
	The ideal candidate should have 1&ndash;2 years of experience in social media management, content creation, digital marketing, and basic campaign reporting. The person must be creative, teachable, organised, professional, and able to communicate technical healthcare products in a clear and engaging way.


Key Responsibilities


	Social Media Management
	Content Creation &amp; Brand Storytelling
	Digital Marketing Campaigns
	Website &amp; Online Visibility Support
	Reporting &amp; Analytics
	Collaboration &amp; Internal Coordination


Required Qualifications &amp; Experience


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree or HND in Marketing, Mass Communication, Business Administration, Digital Marketing, Media Studies, or a related field.
	1&ndash;2 years of experience in social media management, digital marketing, content creation, or a similar role.
	Experience managing business or corporate social media pages is required.
	Experience in healthcare, medical devices, diagnostics, pharmaceuticals, laboratory products, or B2B marketing is an advantage but not compulsory.
	Basic knowledge of digital marketing tools and analytics.
	Good understanding of LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, Canva, Meta Business Suite, Google Business Profile, and basic content scheduling tools.
	Basic video editing and graphic design ability is an advantage.


Required Skills &amp; Attributes:
The ideal candidate must be:


	Creative and able to generate content ideas.
	Organised and able to manage a content calendar.
	Professional in written communication.
	Able to simplify technical information for customers.
	Detail-oriented and careful with facts, product names, and brand information.
	Comfortable working with deadlines.
	Proactive and able to follow up with internal teams for content.
	Teachable and willing to learn about medical/laboratory/IVF products.
	Data-aware and able to use analytics to improve content performance.
	Respectful, responsible, and able to represent the company professionally online.


What We Are Looking For:


	We are looking for someone who can help us build a stronger and more consistent digital presence. The right candidate should understand that social media for a healthcare solutions company is not only about beautiful posts, but also about trust, education, professionalism, visibility, and lead generation.
	This role is suitable for someone who enjoys content creation, digital communication, brand building, and learning about specialised healthcare products.


What We Offer


	Salary: Competitive and based on experience.
	Opportunity to work in a growing healthcare distribution and medical technology company.
	Exposure to IVF, laboratory equipment, and international healthcare brands.
	Opportunity to build a strong portfolio in B2B healthcare marketing.
	A structured work environment with room for learning and growth.
	Opportunity to contribute directly to the company&rsquo;s brand visibility and customer engagement.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV, a brief cover note, and samples/links to previous social media pages or content they have managed to:&nbsp;&nbsp;hr@aaamedicalibrationsltd.com using &quot;Application for Digital Marketing / Social Media Officer&quot; as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-07-01",
  "validThrough": "2026-07-16",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "AAA Medi-Calibrations Limited"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",

      "addressCountry": "NG"

Digital Marketing / Social Media Officer Job at AAA Medi-Calibrations Limited




        
    

        
        AAA Medi-Calibrations Limited is a fast-growing medical equipment, laboratory, IVF, and healthcare solutions company with operations across Nigeria and West Africa. Founded in 2012, AAAMCL has grown from a specialist calibration services company into a trusted provider of high-quality medical laboratory equipment, IVF equipment and consumables,technical support, installation, training, and after-sales service.
     

            
    



At AAAMCL, we serve some of the most specialized and sensitive areas of healthcare, including IVF clinics and specialty laboratories. Our work supports healthcare professionals who rely on precision, quality, reliability, and speed to deliver excellent outcomes for their patients. We partner with reputable international brands and suppliers,allowing us to bring world-class solutions to the African healthcare market.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketing / Social Media Officer

Job Location: Jibowu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	As we continue to expand our product portfolio and market presence, we are looking for a creative, organised, and results-driven Digital Marketing / Social Media Officer to manage our business social media accounts and support the company’s overall digital marketing activities.
	The Digital Marketing / Social Media Officer will be responsible for managing our online presence across social media platforms and supporting digital marketing campaigns that promote our products, services, brand credibility, and customer engagement.
	The ideal candidate should have 1–2 years of experience in social media management, content creation, digital marketing, and basic campaign reporting. The person must be creative, teachable, organised, professional, and able to communicate technical healthcare products in a clear and engaging way.


Key Responsibilities


	Social Media Management
	Content Creation & Brand Storytelling
	Digital Marketing Campaigns
	Website & Online Visibility Support
	Reporting & Analytics
	Collaboration & Internal Coordination


Required Qualifications & Experience


	Bachelor’s degree or HND in Marketing, Mass Communication, Business Administration, Digital Marketing, Media Studies, or a related field.
	1–2 years of experience in social media management, digital marketing, content creation, or a similar role.
	Experience managing business or corporate social media pages is required.
	Experience in healthcare, medical devices, diagnostics, pharmaceuticals, laboratory products, or B2B marketing is an advantage but not compulsory.
	Basic knowledge of digital marketing tools and analytics.
	Good understanding of LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook, Canva, Meta Business Suite, Google Business Profile, and basic content scheduling tools.
	Basic video editing and graphic design ability is an advantage.


Required Skills & Attributes:
The ideal candidate must be:


	Creative and able to generate content ideas.
	Organised and able to manage a content calendar.
	Professional in written communication.
	Able to simplify technical information for customers.
	Detail-oriented and careful with facts, product names, and brand information.
	Comfortable working with deadlines.
	Proactive and able to follow up with internal teams for content.
	Teachable and willing to learn about medical/laboratory/IVF products.
	Data-aware and able to use analytics to improve content performance.
	Respectful, responsible, and able to represent the company professionally online.


What We Are Looking For:


	We are looking for someone who can help us build a stronger and more consistent digital presence. The right candidate should understand that social media for a healthcare solutions company is not only about beautiful posts, but also about trust, education, professionalism, visibility, and lead generation.
	This role is suitable for someone who enjoys content creation, digital communication, brand building, and learning about specialised healthcare products.


What We Offer


	Salary: Competitive and based on experience.
	Opportunity to work in a growing healthcare distribution and medical technology company.
	Exposure to IVF, laboratory equipment, and international healthcare brands.
	Opportunity to build a strong portfolio in B2B healthcare marketing.
	A structured work environment with room for learning and growth.
	Opportunity to contribute directly to the company’s brand visibility and customer engagement.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV, a brief cover note, and samples/links to previous social media pages or content they have managed to:  [email protected] using "Application for Digital Marketing / Social Media Officer" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Personal Assistant to the Managing Director",
  "description": "AAA Medi-Calibrations Limited is a fast-growing medical equipment, laboratory, IVF, and healthcare solutions company with operations across Nigeria and West Africa. Founded in 2012, AAAMCL has grown from a specialist calibration services company into a trusted provider of high-quality medical laboratory equipment, IVF equipment and consumables,technical support, installation, training, and after-sales service.

At AAAMCL, we serve some of the most specialized and sensitive areas of healthcare, including IVF clinics and specialty laboratories. Our work supports healthcare professionals who rely on precision, quality, reliability, and speed to deliver excellent outcomes for their patients. We partner with reputable international brands and suppliers,allowing us to bring world-class solutions to the African healthcare market.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal Assistant to the Managing Director

Job Location: Jibowu, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking to hire a competent, organised, trustworthy, and proactive Personal Assistant to the Managing Director to provide administrative, coordination, and executive support.


Role Description


	The Personal Assistant will support the Managing Director in managing daily schedules, communication, follow-ups, documentation, meetings, travel arrangements, reminders, and personal deadlines.
	The ideal candidate must be highly organised, discreet, detail-oriented, emotionally intelligent, and able to manage multiple tasks without constant supervision.
	This role requires someone who can think ahead, follow up properly, communicate professionally, and help the MD stay structured and effective.


Key Responsibilities


	Calendar, Schedule &amp; Diary Management.
	Communication &amp; Correspondence.
	Follow-Up &amp; Task Tracking.
	Documentation &amp; Filing.
	Travel, Logistics &amp; Personal Coordination.
	Executive Support.
	Confidentiality &amp; Professional Conduct.


Required Qualifications &amp; Experience


	Minimum of HND / Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Business Administration, Secretarial Studies, Management, Communications, or a related field.
	1 &ndash; 3 years of experience as a Personal Assistant, Executive Assistant, Administrative Officer, Office Manager, or similar role.
	Experience supporting a senior executive, entrepreneur, business owner, or managing director is an advantage.
	Strong written and verbal communication skills.
	Good knowledge of Microsoft Office tools: Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook/Google Calendar.
	Ability to use digital tools for scheduling, task tracking, document management, and communication.
	Excellent organisational and follow-up skills.


Required Skills &amp; Attributes:
The ideal candidate must be:


	Highly organised and detail-oriented.
	Proactive and able to anticipate needs.
	Trustworthy and discreet with confidential information.
	Professional in communication and appearance.
	Calm under pressure.
	Able to multitask and prioritise effectively.
	Strong in follow-up and execution.
	Respectful, emotionally intelligent, and mature.
	Comfortable working in a fast-paced business environment.
	Willing to learn and improve continuously.


What We Are Looking For:


	We are looking for someone who does not wait to be chased before acting. The right candidate should be able to take instructions clearly, follow through, ask intelligent questions, keep proper records, and help bring structure to the MD&rsquo;s daily work.
	This role is suitable for someone who enjoys organisation, communication, coordination, and being the reliable support behind a busy executive.


Salary
N250,000 - N350,000 / month (Competitive and based on experience).

Method of Application&nbsp;

Personal Assistant to the Managing Director Job at AAA Medi-Calibrations Limited




        
    

        
        AAA Medi-Calibrations Limited is a fast-growing medical equipment, laboratory, IVF, and healthcare solutions company with operations across Nigeria and West Africa. Founded in 2012, AAAMCL has grown from a specialist calibration services company into a trusted provider of high-quality medical laboratory equipment, IVF equipment and consumables,technical support, installation, training, and after-sales service.
     

            
    



At AAAMCL, we serve some of the most specialized and sensitive areas of healthcare, including IVF clinics and specialty laboratories. Our work supports healthcare professionals who rely on precision, quality, reliability, and speed to deliver excellent outcomes for their patients. We partner with reputable international brands and suppliers,allowing us to bring world-class solutions to the African healthcare market.
